name: USS SC-713 (SC-713)
events: 16 Sep 1944 USS Dragonet (T/Cdr. J.H. Lewis, USN) and USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS SC-713 (Lt.(jg) E.J. Spitz, USNR) and USS SC-986 (Lt.(jg) O.W. Scott, USNR). (1)

17 Sep 1944 USS Dragonet (T/Cdr. J.H. Lewis, USN) and USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS SC-713 (Lt.(jg) E.J. Spitz, USNR) and USS SC-986 (Lt.(jg) O.W. Scott, USNR). (1)

18 Sep 1944 USS Dragonet (T/Cdr. J.H. Lewis, USN) and USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS SC-713 (Lt.(jg) E.J. Spitz, USNR) and USS SC-986 (Lt.(jg) O.W. Scott, USNR). (1)

19 Sep 1944 USS Dragonet (T/Cdr. J.H. Lewis, USN) and USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-713 (Lt.(jg) E.J. Spitz, USNR) and USS SC-986 (Lt.(jg) O.W. Scott, USNR). (1)

21 Sep 1944 USS Kete (T/Cdr. R.L. Rutter, USN) conducted exercises in the Gulf of Panama with USS Alden (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Herkness, 2nd, USN), USS Mallard (T/Lt. B.L. Maddox, USN), USS SC-713 (Lt.(jg) E.J. Spitz, USNR) and USS SC-986 (Lt.(jg) O.W. Scott, USNR). (1)
